eta-coefficient-barrier.summary: Parked frontier marker: c=3 leading coeff of eta(C_p^3)<=3p^2 (BSP 2017) pins C_53 at 4 via sup at n=p*q; only an unconditional sub-3p^2 eta for all large p moves it. No build.

eta-interface-decompose.last_note: R6 VERIFIED: recursion_step_c (eta coeff c as free param, heta:c<=p^2) + recursion_step_of_c (c:=p^2 recovers original). Genuine clean recompile green, axioms [propext,Classical.choice,Quot.sound] on both, no sorry, diff pure +75/-0. Re-derived chain: heta is load-bearing (fails for c>p^2), not vacuous; sub-p^2 instantiation (c=3<4) fires with D m=3m-2 witness. Syntactic eta knob = forward leverage. held stays 4 (conditional, barriered).
eta-interface-decompose.summary: Parameterize the eta additive term: introduce hstepc : D(p*m) ≤ p*D m + c p with c : ℕ → ℤ, hypothesis heta : c p ≤ p^2; re-prove recursion_step_c reusing comparison_ineq verbatim (nlinarith [hcmp, heta p]); specialize c p := p^2 to recover recursion_step. Makes the eta coefficient SYNTACTIC so a future sub-3p^2 eta input re-derives a strictly-better bound mechanically. Lean-fit, conditional, does not move held off 4 — but the only entry with forward leverage to the record.

factors-bridge-max-extract.last_note: Verified: factors_bridge_max ties ps to Nat.primeFactorsList n (Qmax = largest prime factor), closing faithfulness-gap #1. Genuine recompile green, axioms [propext,Classical.choice,Quot.sound], no sorryAx; anti-vacuity confirmed with D m=3m-2 at n=12; honest Q=largest-prime (<=P(n)) preserving C_53<=4, no sub-4 claim. held stays 4.
factors-bridge-max-extract.summary: Tie ps to the real prime factorization: present n = Qmax * (primeFactorsList n).erase Qmax via List.perm_cons_erase + Perm.prod_eq, Q = largest prime factor, feed c53_le_4_per_n. Closes faithfulness-gap #1. Lean-fit, conditional, does not move held off 4. Authors the multiset-induction-variant body (List route).

global-induction-list-fold.last_note: Verified: global factorization induction (List fold of recursion_step over base_in_form) + acc_cast_bridge + c53_le_4_per_n compile green (genuine recompile), axioms clean [propext,Classical.choice,Quot.sound] (bridge [propext]), no sorryAx/no problem-axiom. Algebra re-derived (0 violations), hypotheses non-vacuous (concrete witness). Conditional re-derivation of C_53<=4; held stays 4 (infrastructure, not record-break). Carry-forward: tie ps to Nat.factors n + iSup packaging.
global-induction-list-fold.summary: Fold proved recursion_step over a List of prime factors (ℤ-accumulator + ℕ/ℤ cast bridge) to get D(C_n^3)<=4n-Q-2 for all n; reuses recursion_step+base_in_form verbatim. Lever-A infrastructure, conditional, does not move held off 4. Lean-fit (finite List induction).

isup-packaging-real.last_note: R5: iSup-over-ℝ capstone verified. Clean recompile ("Built Constants.C53a"), c53Ratio_le/c53_isup_real_le/C53_le_4 all axioms [propext,Classical.choice,Quot.sound], no sorryAx. Theorem now literally states C_53=⨆_{n≥2}(D-1)/(n-1)≤4 via ciSup_le (no separate BddAbove; per-term bound IS boundedness, confirmed in pinned Mathlib). 102 pure insertions, zero upstream deletions. hbase ∀-quantified is STRONGER not weaker; anti-vacuity passed (witness D m=3m-2 gives genuine ratio 3≤4). Conditional infra; held stays 4, NOT sub-4. Independently re-derived the ciSup_le+split step.
isup-packaging-real.summary: Package the per-n ℤ inequality (c53_le_4_per_n) into the ℝ ratio bound r n = (D n -1)/(n-1) <= 4 (via div_le_iff cast), optionally the iSup-over-ℝ C_53<=4 (ciSup_le, domain n>=2). Closes faithfulness-gap #2, orthogonal to the factorization slugs. Lean-fit, conditional, does not move held off 4.

lean-conditional-scaffold.last_note: Lean scaffold verified: lake build Constants green (Lean v4.31.0 / Mathlib fabf563), recursion_step + comparison_ineq fully proved, #print axioms clean (no sorryAx/problem axiom), algebra re-derived independently. Conditional re-derivation of recursion step only — held UNCHANGED at 4, no bound improvement. Next: lift to full factorization induction over prime multiset.
lean-conditional-scaffold.summary: Lean-formalize Grinsztajn's conditional induction; round-2 sub-goal = the N recursion lemma D(C_m^3)<=4m-Q-2 & p<=Q => D(C_pm^3)<=4pm-Q-2, axiomatizing the zero-sum inputs (re-derives C_53<=4 conditionally; lake-build certified).

multiset-induction-variant.summary: More faithful factorization fold over Nat.factors/Multiset, tying ps to the actual prime multiset of n with Q=P(n)=largest prime factor. Heavier Mathlib factorization API; follow-on to the List fold, not a parallel build this round. Lean-fit but a one-round stretch.
